title: T-040 — UI: Allergen Cascade widget + Override modal (allergen_cascade + allergen_override_modal)
prompt:
# T-040 — Allergen cascade widget + override modal

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §8.7 + UX allergen_cascade + allergen_override_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/allergen-screens.jsx:5-118 (allergen_cascade) + design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:389-428 (allergen_override_modal)

## Goal
Client widget rendered in Technical tab slot showing auto-derived allergens (badges with source tooltip), may-contain badges, override checkbox per allergen + Refresh button. Override modal opens with reason Textarea + action selector calling setAllergenOverride.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_components/allergen-cascade-widget.tsx (client) + _modals/allergen-override-modal.tsx. Widget reads fa_allergen_cascade view via Server prefetch. Refresh button invokes refresh-cascade Server Action. Modal: shadcn Dialog + RadioGroup (add|remove) + Textarea (reason min 10) + Submit. shadcn Badge primitives.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_components/allergen-cascade-widget.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/allergen-override-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_components/__tests__/allergen-cascade-widget.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/_modals/__tests__/allergen-override-modal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/allergen-screens.jsx [ref]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the widget renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/allergen-screens.jsx:5-118 (allergen_cascade), then it shows 3 sections (RM-derived, process-added, may-contain) with same Badge structure + source tooltip + Refresh button, using shadcn Card+Badge+Tooltip+Button primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given override modal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:389-428 (allergen_override_modal), then it has same 3 controls (allergen Select preselected, action RadioGroup, reason Textarea), and uses shadcn Dialog+RadioGroup+Textarea+Button — verified by RTL parity checklist
3. Given user submits with reason length 8, when modal validates, then submit disabled and FormMessage 'min 10' visible

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests covering both parity ACs + reason length
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test allergen-cascade-widget allergen-override-modal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass debounced Refresh (avoid hammering server)
- Do not call DB directly from client
- Do not skip Tooltip with allergen source
